memoryArtifacts.headline: from wikipedia
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Thomas Leighton (c. 1530–1610) was an English soldier and politician. He served as the Governor of Guernsey and Jersey from 1570 to 1609

memoryArtifacts.headline:
Thomas Leighton
(25 December 1452 – 1519)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Knight of Wattlesborough, Knight Banneret, Knight of the Body to Henry VIII. 

Sheriff of Shropshire.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Leighton於1452年12月25日出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，他的父親John Leighton26歲，母親Ankaret Burgh18歲。他於大約1473年與Anne Baker結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1519年在英國史洛普爾麗頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾麗頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Leighton于1452年12月25日出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，他的父亲John Leighton26岁，母亲Ankaret Burgh18岁。他于大约1473年与Anne Baker结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1519年在英国史洛普爾麗頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾麗頓。

nameMeanings.name: Leighton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Slayton
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Leighton (compare Layton ) with the addition of initial S-. Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Sladen or of Sleightholme, principally a habitational name from Sleightholme Dale in Kirkbymoorside, but perhaps occasionally from Sleightholme in Bowes or the lost Sleightholme in Lythe. The placenames derive from Old Norse sléttr ‘smooth, level’ + holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is now very rare in Britain. Compare Slaydon .

variants.name: Laughton
meanings: habitational name from Laughton en le Morthen in Yorkshire, Laughton in Leicestershire or any of the two places called Laughton in Lincolnshire (one near Gainsborough and another near Folkingham). The places are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, meaning ‘village or farm where leeks are grown’. It may sometimes have alternated with Leighton , which is mostly from placenames with the same etymology.

variants.name: Letton
meanings: English: habitational name, most probably from Letton in Norfolk or Latton in Essex. It could also be a variant of Leighton or Laughton . Most of the places so named have the same etymology as Letton and Latton, i.e. ‘farm where leeks are grown’ (Old English lēac-tūn). Another possibility is that it is a variant of Latten .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Leighton was born on 25 December 1452, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, his father, John Leighton, was 26 and his mother, Ankaret Burgh, was 18. He married Anne Baker about 1473. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1519, in Leighton, Shropshire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Leighton est né le 25 décembre 1452, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, John Leighton, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ankaret Burgh, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Anne Baker environ 1473. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1519, à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Leighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Leighton am 25. Dezember 1452 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Leighton 26 und seine Mutter Ankaret Burgh 18. Er hat um 1473 Anne Baker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1519 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Leighton, Shropshire, England und wurde in Leighton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Leighton è nato il il 25 dicembre 1452 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, John Leighton, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Ankaret Burgh, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Anne Baker circa 1473. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1519, nel Leighton, Shropshire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Leighton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Leightonが1452年12月25日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父John Leightonは26歳，母Ankaret Burghは18歳であった。約1473年にAnne Bakerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1519年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアレイトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Leighton(이)가 1452년 12월 25일 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Leighton(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Ankaret Burgh(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1473년 Anne Baker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1519년 영국 슈럽실르 레이턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 레이턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Leighton nasceu em 25 de dezembro de 1452, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Leighton, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Ankaret Burgh, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Baker aproximadamente 1473. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1519, em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Leighton родился 25 декабря 1452 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Leighton было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ankaret Burgh, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Baker около 1473 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1519 г. в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности лиитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Leighton nació el 25 de diciembre de 1452, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Leighton, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Ankaret Burgh, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Anne Baker aproximadamente 1473. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1519, en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Leighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
